description: The Ferrari 458 Italia, produced from 2009 to 2015, is powered by a naturally aspirated 4.5-litre V8 producing 562 bhp. Widely considered one of the greatest mid-engine Ferraris ever made, the 458 marked Ferrari's transition from the F1 automated manual to a dual-clutch gearbox. The track-focused Speciale variant is highly sought after by collectors.
